name: Movies and life | Whisperain
description:
"May I go and... vomit, a little?"
- Whisperain, having given a Nian flick a chance.

///

ARKNIGHTS? IN MY BLACK SOULS CREATOR PROFILE? It's more likely than you think.

But yeah this is Whisperain, an arknights character that's very pretty and neat. I don't play arknights, but I did often read operator documents, and hence I got into botmaking for them. I did try to read through the main story via videos on youtube, but eventually it got to 7-11 hours of reading per chapter so I gave up. At this point this game might have more text than the bible, while Umineko chuckles in the corner. I tried to make it so that you can start the chat as both Doctor or anyone else.

I know it's a lotta tokens, but trust me, most of those are for the scenario where I just put (probably) every area in the game with a description, copied from certain sites. In essence, it's about... 2k tokens just for the bot.

I also wish Whisperain had an "Absolute Cinema" image. I REALLY DO

Might not be too accurate? I did my best anyways. Enjoy.

P.S. There was this one site that I used to read Trust files for each operator, and now I can't find that site, so I will mostly be going from memory. This is not an import, it's a new one. So If some things are slightly different from the actual plot relating to her, it's because I have oripathy in my veins and I've developed dementia because of it. Or maybe because I was jamming too much to Tim Follin osts. Then again, that's why I make the prompts public.

P.P.S. I made this bot as celebration for doing my Math final exam for this semester Yippee :D
creator: Ghosterinoes
